welcome.body: Namaste {{name}}, BaseKey aur SuperKey ke official platform par aapka swagat hai. Main Ayush Raj aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?

basekey_hub.body: BaseKey ek advanced WhatsApp Business API platform hai jo businesses ko automation aur bulk messaging ki suvidha deta hai.

bk_features.body:
BaseKey Features:
1. Shared Team Inbox
2. Interactive Buttons & Lists
3. Automated Chatbot Flow
4. Real-time Analytics.

bk_pricing.body:
BaseKey Plans:
- Startup: Free (Trial)
- Business: ₹999/Month
- Enterprise: Custom pricing for high volume.

bk_web.body: BaseKey ki official website aur documentation dekhne ke liye niche click karein.

superkey_hub.body: SuperKey ek registered tech firm hai jo Samastipur, Bihar se operate hoti hai. Hum government projects aur digital solutions mein kaam karte hain.

sk_gov.body: SuperKey Central Public Procurement Portal (CPPP) par registered hai aur hum government tenders ke liye bid karte hain.

sk_udyam.body: SuperKey Udyam registered business hai jo MSME ke tahat manyata prapt hai. Ye firm digital empowerment par kendrit hai.

sk_dev.body: Hum custom web applications, API integrations aur cloud hosting solutions provide karte hain.

sk_portfolio.body: Humare pichle projects aur school website examples yahan dekhein.

tools_hub.body: Ayush Raj dwara develop kiye gaye special tools aur applications ki list yahan hai.

tool_lockerkey.body: LockerKey ek secure password manager app hai jo aapke sensitive data ko encrypt karke safe rakhta hai.

lk_web.body: LockerKey dashboard par jaane ke liye niche diye gaye link ka upyog karein.

tool_animation.body: Hum realistic 3D character animation banate hain (PUBG style) jo games aur apps ke liye perfect hain.

contact_sales.body: Aap humein +91 9229966001 par call kar sakte hain ya care@ayus.fun par email bhej sakte hain.

main_menu.body: Wapas Main Menu par swagat hai {{name}}. Agla kadam kya hoga?
